title: Analog
description: A server side mod that add radios for Simple Voice Chat.
body:
# Analog
An addon for [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) that adds handheld radios as well as placeable transmitters and receivers.

## Features
- Handheld radios
- Block transmitters that broadcast nearby players' voices
- Block receivers that can be tuned into a channel for passive listening
- You can hear another person's radio and their radio can pickup your voice
- Handheld radios can enable receiving and transmitting seperately from eachother
- Radios can tune to 100 channels (Can be changed in config)
- Radios have infinite range but only within the same dimension
- Transmitters can play music from nearby jukeboxes over the radio, including custom discs from [AudioPlayer](https://modrinth.com/mod/audioplayer) (1.2.0 or later)
- Receivers output a comparator signal when receiving (1.2.0 or later)

## Usage

![Radio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6d2b29bbf629355dd131f123abfc51b6164fef7.png)

- Right click while in hand to open the radio GUI
- Use the up and down buttons to select a channel
- Press the ON button, by default Receive will be enabled and you will be listening to the channel
- Press the Transmit button to toggle broadcasting your voice and nearby players' voices over the channel
- Press the Receive button to toggle receiving the channel
- Press F (Swap Hands Key) while in hand to quick toggle Transmitting (1.1.0 or later)

![Transmitter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9836d5050f6ef255b48acd24eca702d22dc606af.png)

- Right click to open transmitter GUI
- Use the up and down buttons to select a channel
- Press the ON button and the transmitter will broadcast nearby players' voices over the channel

![Receiver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24fb70cfe1be3c2b44284fde246f902ccac0c5fd.png)

- Right click to open receiver GUI
- Use the up and down buttons to select a channel
- Press the ON button and the receiver will tune into the channel and play anything broadcast over the channel

## Recipes

<details>
<summary>Transmitter Recipe</summary>

![The recipe for the transmitter is two redstone, two copper ingots and a glass block.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb4d0d8735f46e5fb654f558316ab7ab569b0814.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Receiver Recipe</summary>

![The recipe for the receiver is one redstone, two copper ingots, a noteblock and an amethyst shard.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99d47c25bfc673f7d36aa328b613d65be70e2566.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Radio Recipe</summary>

![The recipe for the radio is a transmitter combined with a receiver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/732d86f3a5bcf95ac16656da71de9abd020cb337.png)

</details>

## Notes for Servers
Analog requires clients to have the mod on their side or they need to have a resource pack enabled. For a fully server side setup you can use [Polymer's Autohost](https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/) to automatically send the resource pack to clients.
